body.title: BaseShim: foreground-attach helper for visible terminal sessions
body.result: BaseShim.spawn_foreground_session static helper; sudo_relay refactored to use it; 5 tests
body.intention: I intend that any device needing a visible terminal uses a single well-tested shim helper.
body.description:
Devices that need a visible terminal (sudo_relay, any future interactive device) currently have to re-implement the attach-or-create tmux pattern themselves. This should live in BaseShim as a shared utility.

Pattern: if caller has a tty, exec into the tmux session (takes over current terminal, password prompt visible). If no tty (automation/shim call), create detached with --no-attach semantics. sudo_relay already implements this inline as of 2026-06-05 fix.

**Affected files:** unseen_university/shim.py (add spawn_foreground_session helper), sudo_relay (refactor to use it once shim provides it)
**Design rules:** BaseDevice/BaseShim pattern
**Scope boundary:** IN — shared tmux attach-or-create utility in BaseShim. OUT — changing any device's behavior beyond using the new helper
**Completion criteria:** BaseShim has spawn_foreground_session(session, cmd, no_attach=False); sudo_relay uses it; existing behavior unchanged
